text:
umass1: <SupTronics X829, class 0/0, rev 3.00/1.00, addr 6> on usbus0
umass1:  SCSI over Bulk-Only; quirks = 0x0100
umass1:1:1: Attached to scbus1
da1 at umass-sim1 bus 1 scbus1 target 0 lun 0
da1: <ASMT 2115 0> Fixed Direct Access SPC-4 SCSI device
da1: Serial Number 20201000000A
da1: 400.000MB/s transfers
da1: 953869MB (1953525168 512 byte sectors)
da1: quirks=0x2<NO_6_BYTE>
----
detected but not available in gpart, normally I would say :
'gpart create -s GPT da1`. .... ' gpart add -t freebsd-ufs da1 ...'newfs -U /dev/da1p1`(or da1s1 or whatever shows up in `ls /dev`)...

but that doesn't answer the 2-disk-setup-issue for now...
perhaps 1st format 1 disk, then connect&format the 2nd? .. 
hard to remote-debug by guessing...
but all in all good news that the phy is detected...
